title: External Reference
description: A reference to an equivalent entity in an external authority database. Used to link Herbapedia entities to Wikidata, GBIF, POWO, and other authoritative sources for data enrichment and verification.

@id.description: Full URI to the external entity.

oneOf.description: Full URI as a string (shorthand form)

supportedAuthorities.name: Wikidata
supportedAuthorities.description: General knowledge base. Preferred for most entities.

supportedAuthorities.name: GBIF
supportedAuthorities.description: Global Biodiversity Information Facility. Primary source for botanical species data, distribution, and taxonomy.

supportedAuthorities.name: POWO
supportedAuthorities.description: Plants of the World Online (Kew). Authoritative for plant nomenclature and taxonomy.

supportedAuthorities.name: NCBI Taxonomy
supportedAuthorities.description: NCBI Taxonomy database. Useful for genetic and molecular data.

supportedAuthorities.name: Wikipedia
supportedAuthorities.description: Wikipedia articles. Use for general reference, not as primary authority.

supportedAuthorities.name: TCM Database@Taiwan
supportedAuthorities.description: TCM Database Taiwan for molecular docking and drug discovery.

supportedAuthorities.name: PubChem
supportedAuthorities.description: PubChem compound database for chemical entities.

supportedAuthorities.name: ChEBI
supportedAuthorities.description: Chemical Entities of Biological Interest ontology.

usageNotes: Wikidata is the preferred external reference for most entities
GBIF is essential for plant species (also store gbifID as separate property)
POWO is preferred for taxonomic verification
Always verify the external ID before adding a reference
Multiple external references are encouraged for cross-validation
